YUWANCARD-PIG_HURT.title: Pig Hurt
YUWANCARD-PIG_HURT.description: Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
YUWANCARD-PIG_THINK.title: Pig Think
YUWANCARD-PIG_ANGRY.title: Pig Angry
YUWANCARD-PIG_SLEEP.title: Pig Sleep
YUWANCARD-PIG_SLEEP.description:
End your turn
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP
YUWANCARD-PIG_SACRIFICE.title: Pig Sacrifice
YUWANCARD-PIG_SACRIFICE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Give all HP and Block to target ally.|Give 50% HP and Block to target ally.}
YUWANCARD-PIG_DOUBT.title: Pig Doubt
YUWANCARD-NYJK.title: You Are Crying
YUWANCARD-NYJK.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Weak[/gold] to an enemy and remove 50% of its [gold]Block[/gold].
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.title: I Give You
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.description: Choose a card from your hand to give to target ally.
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.selectionScreenPrompt: Select 1 card to give to ally
YUWANCARD-WYJK.title: I Am Crying
YUWANCARD-MELANCHOLY_RABBIT.title: Melancholy Is A Feeling
YUWANCARD-MELANCHOLY_RABBIT.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current HP.
YUWANCARD-SAD_ARMY_WIN.title: Sad Army Win
YUWANCARD-SAD_ARMY_WIN.description: When your HP is below 10% of max HP, instantly win this combat.
YUWANCARD-REVIVE_KAI.title: Revive!
YUWANCARD-REVIVE_KAI.description: Revive a dead ally and restore them to {IfUpgraded:show:100%|50%} max HP.
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK.title: Rain Dark
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK.description: All players' HP becomes 25% of max HP, gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Intangible[/gold], double current Energy. For next {RainDarkPower:diff()} turns: gain double Energy, fill hand. Restore [gold]6[/gold] HP after combat.
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_SELECT.title: Rain Dark
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_SELECT.description: Add a [gold]Rain Dark[/gold] to your hand.
YUWANCARD-TEN_THOUSAND_SWORDS.title: Ten Thousand Swords
YUWANCARD-TEN_THOUSAND_SWORDS.descriptio: Stack other players' [gold]Forge[/gold] onto yourself, then clear their [gold]Forge[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_TOUCH_FISH.title: Pig Touch Fish
YUWANCARD-PIG_TOUCH_FISH.description: Keep hand for next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY.title: Pig Bankruptcy
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY.description: All cards in hand cost 0 this turn and gain [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_CHARGE.title: Pig Charge
YUWANCARD-PIG_MULTI_SHOT.title: Pig Barrage
YUWANCARD-PIG_MULTI_SHOT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to one enemy.
YUWANCARD-PIG_SHIELD_BREAK.title: Pig Shield Break
YUWANCARD-PIG_SHIELD_BREAK.description: Remove 50% of an enemy's [gold]Block[/gold] and deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
YUWANCARD-PIG_KING.title: Pig King
YUWANCARD-PIG_KING.description: Choose 3 cards and transform them into {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Pig Charge[/gold], [gold]Pig Barrage[/gold], [gold]Pig Shield Break[/gold]
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD.title: Pig Brain Overload
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards this turn. Gain 1 [gold]Daze[/gold] every {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} turns.
YUWANCARD-PIG_MELT.title: Pig Melt
YUWANCARD-PIG_DRAGON_RIDE.title: Pig Dragon Ride
YUWANCARD-PIG_DRAGON_RIDE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {HitCount} times to one enemy.
YUWANCARD-PIG_CRASH.title: Pig Crash
YUWANCARD-PIG_CRASH.description: Lose {SelfDamage} HP and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG.title: You Are Pig
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG.description: Transform target ally into a pig, giving them {BufferPower:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold] and {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold], end their turn.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BITE.title: Pig Bite
YUWANCARD-PIG_BITE.description: Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold], {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold], {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy. Transform into pig for 1 turn.
YUWANCARD-ALL_IN.title: All In
YUWANCARD-ALL_IN.description: Randomly play {Magic:diff()} cards from [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. These cards gain [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
YUWANCARD-STEAL_CARD.title: Steal Card
YUWANCARD-STEAL_CARD.description: Choose 1 card from target ally's [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add it to your hand.
YUWANCARD-STEAL_CARD.selectionScreenProm: Select 1 card to steal from ally's draw pile
YUWANCARD-PULL_NET_CABLE.title: Pull Net Cable
YUWANCARD-PULL_NET_CABLE.description: Target ally will be controlled by [gold]Vakuu[/gold] for {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} turn(s).
YUWANCARD-TIAO_JIAO.title: Train You Well
YUWANCARD-TIAO_JIAO.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ally. Give them {TrainYouWellPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
YUWANCARD-DO_NOT_DIE.title: Don't Die
YUWANCARD-DO_NOT_DIE.description: Restore [green]{HealPercentage}%[/green] of ally's max HP. Give them {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PRESSURE_YOU.title: Pressure You
YUWANCARD-PRESSURE_YOU.description: Make target ally lose 1 Energy. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 1 card.
YUWANCARD-STONE_CARRYING_KING.title: Stone Carrying King
YUWANCARD-STONE_CARRYING_KING.descriptio: Transform all cards in an ally's hand into {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Boulders[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_STRIKE.title: Pig Strike
YUWANCARD-PIG_DEFEND.title: Pig Defend
YUWANCARD-PIG_INSPIRE.title: Pig Inspire
YUWANCARD-PIG_SHELTER.title: Pig Shelter
YUWANCARD-PIG_UNITY.title: Pig Unity
YUWANCARD-PIG_UNITY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Each alive ally gives all allies {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_GUARD.title: Pig Guard
YUWANCARD-PIG_GUARD.description: Target ally gains {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. You gain {PlatingPower} [gold]Plating[/gold]. Exhaust.
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS.title: Pig Friends
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS.description: Gain {PigFriendsPower:diff()} [gold]Pig Friends[/gold]. When gained, summon a Pig Minion. Every 3 stacks, upgrade it.
YUWANCARD-PIG_ENCOURAGE.title: Pig Energize
YUWANCARD-PIG_CURSE.title: Pig Curse
YUWANCARD-PIG_BLESSING.title: Pig Blessing
YUWANCARD-PIG_SMASH.title: Pig Smash
YUWANCARD-PIG_TAUNT.title: Pig Taunt
YUWANCARD-PIG_RICE_MEAL.title: Pig Rice Meal
YUWANCARD-PIG_RICE_MEAL.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Transform all Status cards in your hand into {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Pig Feed[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_FEED.title: Pig Feed
YUWANCARD-PIG_FEED.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). Pig recovers {Heal:diff()} HP.
YUWANCARD-PIG_TOUCH.title: Pig Touch
YUWANCARD-BUG_PIG.title: Bug Pig
YUWANCARD-BUG_PIG.description: Deal {BugPigDamage:diff()} damage to an enemy. Damage increases by {IfUpgraded:show:5|3} for each line starting with [red]ERROR[/red] or [red]ERROR[/red] in the log.
YUWANCARD-PIG_CHOP.title: Pig Chop
YUWANCARD-DIMENSION_SLASH.title: Dimension Slash
YUWANCARD-DIMENSION_SLASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Copy all [gold]Debuffs[/gold] from target enemy to other enemies.
YUWANCARD-PERFECT_THING.title: Perfect Thing
YUWANCARD-BLACK_HOLE.title: Black Hole
YUWANCARD-BLACK_HOLE.description: Exhaust any number of cards. Deal {Magic:diff()} damage for each card Exhausted. Exhaust.
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG.title: Hacker Pig
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG.description: Choose 1 card from your hand. It will be automatically played at the start of your turn. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG.selectionScreenProm: Choose 1 card to play at turn start
YUWANCARD-BLOOD_WHEEL_EYE.title: Blood Wheel Eye
YUWANCARD-BLOOD_WHEEL_EYE.description: All cards gain Replay 1 this combat. Exhaust.
YUWANCARD-PIG_REPLAY.title: Pig Replay
YUWANCARD-PIG_REPLAY.description: Choose 1 card from your hand. It gains {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} Replay. Exhaust.
YUWANCARD-PIG_STAY_UP_LATE.title: Pig Stay Up Late
YUWANCARD-PIG_STAY_UP_LATE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Damage is doubled and gain [gold]Weak[/gold] when system time is 23:00-02:00.
YUWANCARD-MANY_PIGS.title: Many Pigs
YUWANCARD-PIG_RECHARGE.title: Pig Recharge
